zh.lifeSummary: 當Hamon De Turberville於1350年出生時，他的父親Tomkin De Turberville40歲，母親Gwenllian Norreys20歲。他於大約1374年與Catherine verch Thomas Bevon of Bryn在威爾士凱爾納方史爾凱爾納方結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1425年在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根泰斯頓享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hamon De Turberville于1350年出生时，他的父亲Tomkin De Turberville40岁，母亲Gwenllian Norreys20岁。他于大约1374年与Catherine verch Thomas Bevon of Bryn在威尔士凱爾納方史爾凱爾納方结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1425年在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根泰斯頓享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Turberville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, probably from Thouberville (Eure), or possibly from Trubleville (Seine-Maritime), both in France. The two may have been confused in surname usage.

variants.name: Torbet
meanings: Scottish:

from the Anglo-Norman and Middle English personal name T(h)urbert, T(h)orbert, a hybrid of Old Norse Thorr ‘Thor’, the name of the god of thunder, + ancient Germanic -berht ‘bright, famous’. The name was probably formed on the Continent; see Turberville .
perhaps in some cases a nickname from Old French and Middle English turbot, turbut ‘turbot’, for someone who caught or sold or resembled this fish.

variants.name: Turbyfill
meanings: Altered form of English   Turberville  .

variants.name: Tuberville
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Turberville  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Turville
meanings: English (Surrey and Hampshire; of Norman origin):
habitational name from Tourville‐la‐Campagne (Eure, France). The placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Thórr + Old French ville ‘farmstead, estate’ (from Latin villa).
occasionally a shortened form of   Turberville  .

variants.name: Turbeville
meanings: English: variant of   Turberville  .

variants.name: Troublefield
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Turberville  .

nameMeanings.name: Hamon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

variants.name: Éamann
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

variants.name: Eamonn
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

variants.name: Eamon
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

variants.name: Éaman
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Hamon De Turberville was born in 1350, his father, Tomkin De Turberville, was 40 and his mother, Gwenllian Norreys, was 20. He married Catherine verch Thomas Bevon of Bryn about 1374, in Caernarfon, Caernarfonshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died about 1425, in Tythegston, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hamon De Turberville est né en 1350, son père, Tomkin De Turberville, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian Norreys, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Catherine verch Thomas Bevon of Bryn environ 1374, à Caernarfon, Caernarfonshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1425, à Tythegston, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hamon De Turberville 1350 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Tomkin De Turberville 40 und seine Mutter Gwenllian Norreys 20. Er hat um 1374 in Caernarfon, Caernarfonshire, Wales Catherine verch Thomas Bevon of Bryn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1425 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Tythegston, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hamon De Turberville è nato il nel 1350, il suo padre, Tomkin De Turberville, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian Norreys, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Catherine verch Thomas Bevon of Bryn circa 1374, nel Caernarfon, Caernarfonshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1425, nel Tythegston, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hamon De Turbervilleが1350年に生まれた時，父Tomkin De Turbervilleは40歳，母Gwenllian Norreysは20歳であった。約1374年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアケエルナルフォンでCatherine verch Thomas Bevon of Brynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1425年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガントイスエグストンで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hamon De Turberville(이)가 1350년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Tomkin De Turberville(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian Norreys(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1374년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 카이른아르폰에서 Catherine verch Thomas Bevon of Bryn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1425년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 타이테그스턴에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hamon De Turberville nasceu em 1350, seu pai, Tomkin De Turberville, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian Norreys, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine verch Thomas Bevon of Bryn aproximadamente 1374, em Caernarfon, Caernarfonshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1425, em Tythegston, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hamon De Turberville родился в 1350 г., его отцу по имени Tomkin De Turberville было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian Norreys, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine verch Thomas Bevon of Bryn около 1374 г. в местности каирнарфон, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1425 г. в местности титегстон, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет.
